final.sql:
WITH store_sales_by_state AS (
    SELECT
        s.s_store_sk,
        s.s_state,
        SUM(ss.ss_net_profit) AS total_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = {{year}}
    GROUP BY s.s_store_sk, s.s_state
),
ranked_stores AS (
    SELECT
        s_store_sk,
        s_state,
        total_sales,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s_state ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS rn
   ...
